title: MVP Scope
summary: What is in and out of scope for the first pilot release.

blocks.heading: In scope for MVP / pilot
bullets: Company, site, fleet and equipment management
Telemetry ingestion from simulated or live provider feeds
Fuel analytics, anomaly detection, health scoring and alerting
Investor-ready dashboard and reporting views
Role-based authentication and REST APIs
Shadow-mode analytics alongside existing provider platforms
Initial statistical anomaly detection (analytics maturity L1–L2)

blocks.heading: Out of scope for MVP
bullets: Custom AI chip development
Full autonomous edge hardware platform
Production-grade multi-region scale from day one
Advanced supervised ML requiring unavailable labeled data
GPS geofencing and operator scoring (Phase 2)

blocks.heading: Engineering principles
bullets: Reliable ingestion and clean data before sophisticated models
Integrate into existing systems first
Explainable analytics before opaque models
Design for future scale; optimize MVP for pilot ROI
Modular monolith for pilot; decompose when scale demands

blocks.heading: Pilot success criteria
bullets: Ingest data from at least one live provider
Onboard at least one real pilot site with stable daily ingestion
Detect and surface actionable fuel anomalies
Identify at least one credible cost-saving or loss-prevention opportunity
Establish baseline analytics accuracy metrics
